lines: Tabitha holds four cup handles through the fingers of one hand.
"Susanna’s board shows three. My house did not misplace a person."

choices.label: Ask who the fourth cup belongs to
Leave Tabitha in the water line

lines: "My mother, Sarai Rufinus. She stopped carrying her own jar when her knees turned."
"The aide copied last winter’s count and mistook dependence for absence."

choices.label: Ask whether the guards knew her name
Leave Tabitha in the water line

lines: "Hadar kept the tap shut because the board told him to. I blame the order, but I blame his silence more."
"He could have said my mother’s name while refusing her water. No order forbade that."

choices.label: Leave Tabitha in the water line
